features.name: virtual class parameterized by package struct
features.description: Code should include a virtual class with a parameter that is a packed struct type defined in a package

features.name: localparam type with parameter field width
features.description: Code should include a localparam type declaration inside a parameterized class where the type width depends on a field of the parameter struct

features.name: nested type access via scope resolution in interface
features.description: Code should include an interface that uses scope resolution operator to access a nested type from a parameterized virtual class instantiation

features.name: interface parameterized by package struct
features.description: Code should include an interface that has a parameter of type packed struct from a package

features.name: struct parameter passed through interface hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a module that instantiates an interface with a struct parameter and passes it to another module
